offer: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 deliveries/week, inefficient fleet operations cause increased costs. We provide a data analytics dashboard instead of manual tracking and reporting of delivery metrics.
problem: Inefficient fleet operations leading to increased costs and delayed deliveries.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers
Indie Hackers discussions on logistics efficiency
DM outreach to logistics carriers with demo video
Community forums for logistics tools and solutions
try_it: Let users try delivery metrics visualization on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the dashboard
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
